# Reality Gets a Vote

Layer: Canon (reached via Orientation)
Lives in: Corpus Map v2
Status: The house rule. Survived every test.

## The idea

Frameworks, stories, and symbols are useful — but none of them outrank lived
reality. When a document and ordinary life disagree, ordinary life wins.

Reality interrupting a framework is a feature, not a bug. The moment a model,
a metaphor, or a beautiful theory collides with what is actually true on a
Tuesday, the Tuesday wins. Always.

## How it shows up

Daniela asking if anyone fed the dogs. A diagnosis rearranging priorities. A
build that compiles or doesn't. A search bar that works or doesn't. These are
reality casting its vote, and the vote is final.

— Receipt preserved in the Archaeology layer.
